zh.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington於1390年出生在英國英格蘭。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1420年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington于1390年出生在英国英格兰。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1420年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Donington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Donnington
meanings: English: locative name from Donington (Lincs, Shrops), Donington on Bain (Lincs), Donington le Heath, Castle Donington (Leics), or Donnington (Berks, Gloucs, Herefs, Shrops).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington was born in 1390, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died after 1420, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington est né en 1390, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1420, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington wurde 1390 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1420 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington è nato il nel 1390 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1420, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Doningtonは1390年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1420年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington(은)는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington nasceu em 1390, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1420, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington родился в 1390 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1420 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Donington nació en 1390, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1420, en su pueblo.
